cover: Split-screen comparison infographic: 'Salesforce CI/CD Security Overhaul 2026'. Deep navy blue bold header. LEFT COLUMN 'OLD PIPELINES' (soft red/grey, bold blue-grey header box): blocks for 'sf org display exposes accessToken', 'jq parses credentials from JSON', 'tokens copied into build artifacts' each with small warning icon. Central flow diagram showing tangled lines between GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Scratch Org Pool, Production Deploy Job. RIGHT COLUMN 'SECURE 2026 PIPELINES' (soft green/blue, bright blue header box): blocks for 'credential output redacted', 'JWT or OIDC login per environment', 'separate credential view command gated by permissions'. Central glowing node 'Non-Interactive Auth Boundary' with clean straight lines to DevHub, UAT, Production. Speedometer labeled SAFE pointing green. Clean vector SaaS aesthetic, deep navy/teal/blue palette on light blue-grey background.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Stop Scraping sf CLI Credentials'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Stop Scraping sf CLI Credentials'. Subtitle 'Salesforce CI/CD security update 2026 breaks token parsing by design'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Redacted stdout with shield icon', 'No JSON token loophole with lock icon', 'Per-job auth boundary with pipeline icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BROKEN PATTERN' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'SECURE PATTERN' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: const token = JSON.parse(execSync('sf org display --json').toString()).result.accessToken; console.log(token); right column green border '// GOOD' code: execFileSync('sf', ['org','login','jwt','--client-id', process.env.SF_CLIENT_ID!, '--jwt-key-file', 'server.key', '--username', process.env.SF_USERNAME!, '--alias', 'uat']); BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Do not parse tokens', 'Do not upload auth artifacts', 'Authenticate inside each job'. Footer bar: 'Credentials belong in secret stores, not CLI output'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Secure Agentforce 2.0 CI/CD Auth Boundaries'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Secure Agentforce 2.0 CI/CD Auth Boundaries'. Subtitle 'Agent Script, AiAuthoringBundle, and deployment jobs must not share Salesforce tokens'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Agent Script lint with file icon', 'AiAuthoringBundle deploy with package icon', 'Session regression test with robot icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'TOKEN ARTIFACT PIPELINE' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'PER-JOB AUTH PIPELINE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: echo $SFDX_AUTH_URL > agent-auth.txt; uploadArtifact('agent-auth.txt'); right column green border '// GOOD' code: sf org login jwt --client-id $SF_CLIENT_ID --jwt-key-file server.key --username $SF_AGENTFORCE_USERNAME --alias agentforce-ci. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'No auth artifacts', 'Separate Agentforce user', 'Validate .agent files in source'. Footer bar: 'Agentforce pipelines are deployment pipelines, not token relay systems'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
